summary: Complete testing of quiz/test history data persistence with user_name field. All 7 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified Board page displays TestHistoryTable with real data (83 records) and Dashboard page correctly has no History tab.
critical_code_review_comments: quiz_routes.py (lines 814-854): Quiz submission correctly saves to quiz_history with user_name field - fetches from users collection first, falls back to demo_names dict
dashboard_routes.py (lines 969-1135): test-history endpoint correctly aggregates from quiz_history, quiz_results, battle_submissions, user_battle_history with user_name in each record
Board.js (lines 253-265): fetchTestHistory correctly calls /api/dashboard/test-history/{user_id} and passes data to TestHistoryTable
TestHistoryTable.js: TanStack DataTable correctly displays all fields including user_name (though user_name column not visible in table, it's in the data)
seed_data_creation: Quiz submissions created during testing (auto-saved to quiz_history)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quiz history persistence fully functional. Key flows: 1) POST /api/quiz/start with {exam, subject, isClassBased, class_name, chapter, numberOfQuestions, userId} returns quizId and questions with correctAnswer. 2) POST /api/quiz/submit with {quizId, answers} saves to quiz_history with user_name. 3) GET /api/dashboard/test-history/{user_id} returns all history with user_name field. Board page (/board) shows TestHistoryTable with 83 records. Dashboard (/dashboard) has only Posts, Quiz Rooms, Reposts tabs - no History tab.

backend_api_tests.test_demo_login_returns_user_info: PASS - Returns user with name='Demo Student 1' and id='demo1-uuid'
backend_api_tests.test_quiz_start_and_submit_saves_to_hist: PASS - Quiz submission saves to quiz_history with user_name='Demo Student 1'
backend_api_tests.test_test_history_returns_real_data_with: PASS - Returns 83 records with user_name field in each
backend_api_tests.test_all_history_entries_have_non_empty_: PASS - All 83 records have valid user_name (not 'Unknown' or empty)
backend_api_tests.test_quiz_submission_saves_all_required_: PASS - Saves exam, subject, correct_answers, wrong_answers, accuracy, xp_earned
backend_api_tests.test_dashboard_stats_reflect_real_data: PASS - Stats calculated from real quiz/battle history
backend_api_tests.test_history_includes_multiple_types: PASS - History includes quiz, battle, quiz_room, 1v1 types

frontend_ui_tests.board_test_history_table: PASS - data-testid='test-history-table' found with real data
frontend_ui_tests.board_stats_bar: PASS - Shows Avg Score 55%, Avg Accuracy 55%, Best Rank #35, Total XP 5,013
frontend_ui_tests.board_data_table: PASS - Table shows 8 rows with pagination 'Showing 8 of 83'
frontend_ui_tests.board_real_data: PASS - Table shows real records: CBSE/Science 100%, NEET/Chemistry 43%, SSC CGL/English 57%, UPSC CSE/Economics 53%
frontend_ui_tests.dashboard_history_tab_removed: PASS - History tab NOT found on Dashboard
frontend_ui_tests.dashboard_test_history_removed: PASS - TestHistoryTable NOT found on Dashboard

feature_verification.quiz_history_persistence: VERIFIED - Quiz submissions save to quiz_history collection with user_name field
feature_verification.user_name_in_history: VERIFIED - All 83 records have valid user_name='Demo Student 1' (not 'Unknown')
feature_verification.real_data_not_static: VERIFIED - Stats bar shows real calculated values (55% avg, #35 rank, 5013 XP)
feature_verification.test_history_on_board: VERIFIED - TestHistoryTable displays on /board with all data-testid attributes
feature_verification.test_history_removed_from_dashboard: VERIFIED - No History tab or TestHistoryTable on /dashboard
feature_verification.dashboard_tabs_correct: VERIFIED - Dashboard has only Posts, Quiz Rooms, Reposts tabs
